titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Maysarah
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Maysarah

segments: ه عن عليّ بن ميسرة فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن عليّ الوشّاء، عن عليّ بن ميسرة.
arabic.text: ه عن عليّ بن ميسرة فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن عليّ الوشّاء، عن عليّ بن ميسرة.

segments: And whatever is narrated from Ali ibn Maysarah, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Isa, from Al-Hasan ibn Ali Al-Washsha', from Ali ibn Maysarah.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Ali ibn Maysarah, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Isa, from Al-Hasan ibn Ali Al-Washsha', from Ali ibn Maysarah.
